name: bda-template-project
description: Starter template for Product Knowledge as Code architecture

scripts.generate:tests: npm run verify:sync && node scripts/generate-tests.js && node scripts/generate-api-tests.js
scripts.demo:flow: npm run simulate:impact && npm run simulate:knowledge-update && npm run generate:md-tests && npm run demo:execute
scripts.test: npm run test:api && npm run test:ui
